== Notes for [[Item:Q87782|Q87782]] ==

Twice Consul of Rome, winner of the Third Macedonic War. Was elected with the title of Censor.

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucius_Aemilius_Paullus_(consul_219_BC)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2940B381481EFBBE49822EF79916C7125
geni:6000000042187750856

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
